title: pinus nigra var. latisquama
intro: Pinus nigra var. latisquama, also known as the Bulgarian pine or Dalmatian stone pine, is a variety of the Black Pine tree native to the Balkan Peninsula. The resin of this tree has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating respiratory issues, wounds, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Pinus nigra var. latisquama include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include essential oils, resins, and extracts, which can be used in aromatherapy, topical applications, or as a dietary supplement.
